title: Cloak of Gray Tomorrow
description: Adds a cloak that gives you total invisibility... at a price.
body:
This mod adds the **Cloak of Gray Tomorrow**, which lets you become _fully invisible_, including armor, held items and other trinkets, for 30 seconds.

The catch? When those 30 seconds are up (or when you deactivate the cloak manually), you **become blind for however long you were invisible for**.

You activate the cloak by putting on the hood - by default, this is bound to `V` (can be rebound in the Controls menu, under "Toggle Cloak Hood").

---

This item is from [Prequel Adventure](https://prequeladventure.com), which is (c) Kazerad 2011-2022.
